component.name: Immich Sync
component.summary: A background daemon to auto-sync photos to Immich on Linux

description.p: Immich Sync is a Linux daemon running in the background to automatically synchronize your local media files to a designated Immich server.

It watches configured folders, utilizes inotify for instantaneous event triggering, tracks deduplication via SHA-1 checksum computations locally, and securely stores configuration parameters leveraging the native secret keyring standard. Includes a system tray indicator for settings and manual controls.
